name_en: !!️【With full original green box packaging】!!️【New Arrival】 Creative Director Sabato De Sarno presents the new GG monogram coated canvas, creating a soft, lightweight, and durable exquisite material. This Gucci Horsebit 1955 series chain wallet is presented in beige and dark brown, cleverly incorporating elegant Gucci AnacRed leather trim.
name_cn:
!!️【With full original green box packaging】!!️【New Arrival】 Creative Director Sabato De Sarno presents the new GG monogram coated canvas, creating a soft, lightweight, and durable exquisite material. This Gucci Horsebit 1955 series chain wallet is presented in beige and dark brown, cleverly incorporating elegant Gucci AnacRed leather trim.
Beige and dark brown new GG monogram coated canvas
Gucci AnacRed leather trim
Light gold tone hardware
Cloud print fabric lining
Interior: 6 card slots, 1 flat pocket, 1 gusseted zip pocket and 1 open pocket
1 zip pocket
1 open pocket
Detachable chain strap 58cm high
Snap closure
Weight: approx. 0.3kg
Model: 621892.
Open size: 19cm(W)x 21cm(H)x 2.5cm(D)
Closed size: 19cm(W)x 10cm(H)x 4cm(D)
Color: AnacRed/pvc.
Italian Creation
